description_long: This object consists of three military-style combat knives, each featuring a robust, single-edged blade with a slightly curved profile and a sharp point. The blades are metallic, showing a matte, slightly worn finish, and are attached to cylindrical handles with pronounced grip rings for secure handling. The handles are made of stacked leather or synthetic segments, with one knife displaying a brass-colored guard and pommel, while the others have darker, more subdued metallic fittings. Each knife includes a prominent crossguard between the blade and handle, enhancing safety during use. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. These knives are typical of those used in outdoor, survival, or tactical urban scenarios.
description: A set of three rugged combat knives with single-edged, slightly curved blades and ribbed cylindrical handles, each featuring a crossguard. The knives have a utilitarian, military-inspired design with metallic blades and leather or synthetic grips.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three knives' blades facing forward, highlighting the crossguards and the distinct handle colors and textures.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the blades and the cylindrical, ribbed handles, with the knives lying parallel to each other.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the rounded pommels and the segmented grip patterns of the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blades' profiles and the alignment of the handles, emphasizing the thickness and length of the knives.
attribute_blade_type: single-edged, slightly curved, pointed, plain edge
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, ribbed, stacked leather or synthetic segments, rounded pommel, ergonomic grip
